g.text: Object Storage Bucket Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- The modeled update surface excludes storage tier and other
- Missing Secrets still allow completion, but Secret-delete
- Confirm bucket disappearance with follow-up GetBucket
calls until the bucket is gone or not found.
- Delete the owned connection Secret after bucket deletion
namespace is required before mutate or delete
OCI state in CREATING, UPDATING, RESOLVING
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
